title: User Guides - Onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens opened from App Settings > User Guides display correctly when navigating through all screens
steps: Scroll down and tap on 'User Guides'
Swipe left through all onboarding screens
Swipe right to navigate back through onboarding screens
expected: All onboarding screens display correctly with proper text, images, and layout. Navigation (swipe left/right) works smoothly between screens without any visual glitches, truncation, or missing elements.
